title: papillaria
intro: Papillaria is a type of lichen that belongs to the family Leptoblastidaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its antifungal and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Papillaria include its potential to treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and dermatitis, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Papillaria are often made into teas or tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
